name: @canopy/agent-provisioning
description: Facade package — composes @canopy/core + the standardisation substrates (vault, oidc-session, webid-discovery, ...) into a one-call `provisionAgent({...})` factory. Apps that want the canonical Hub-free bring-up use this; everything else can compose substrates manually. Authored 2026-05-11 as part of the standardisation P1 work (Phase 50.5.b).
